---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or integration for NeuroMeshOSS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm frustrated when I try to connect..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, designs, or API drafts about the feature request here.
